title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"This show, this challenge, this wager upon my
very own dignity... It's all for you, as well as a
beloved schoolmate of mine."

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Our dorm leader is so beautiful even
through a screen!

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she's doing this to lead the way for us?
Oh my gosh, what if she really wins everything?!

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Resident C
text_block_list.text:
If she does, I think I'll try for the Triple Crown
tour even though I suck at turf races!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
If it's really that easy to overcome your innate
weaknesses, I wouldn't have given up in the first
place...

Excitement and nervousness fill the stands.
Meanwhile, Fuji Kiseki is answering questions
from reporters before the race.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
I believe you said that you have a greater affinity
with mile races during a recent press conference,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Add that to the fact that my costars
are all strong competitors, and this won't be an
easy race by any stretch.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Today's race is 2,400 meters long! It's 400 meters
longer than the Satsuki Sho, but I think I still have
a fighting chance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And then, a 3,000-meter challenge awaits in the
fall, so I'll need to think up some magic to help
me then.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Thank you for the wonderful answer.
Could you share your final thoughts with us,
please?

Prompted by the reporter, Fuji Kiseki looks
straight into the camera.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is the second summit I plan to conquer. This
race is one full of possibility, and it's my gift to
you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Keep your eyes on me, and look forward to my
victory!

With that, a flurry of flower petals obscure the
screen, and the impromptu interview comes to a
close.

It's time for the curtains to rise on this G1
powerhouse showcase—the Japanese Derby!
